message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Customer
participant "BileMo" as BileMo
participant "Database" as Database

Customer -> BileMo : DELETE /users/{id}
activate BileMo
BileMo -> Database : DELETE FROM customer_users cu WHERE cu.id = ?
Database --> BileMo
BileMo --> Customer : [204 Response status code]
deactivate BileMo

actor Customer
@enduml
